title: The Hidden Oasis
lines: The violet light from your flashlight reflects off something real. The mirage shatters, revealing a small, hidden pool of water surrounded by black, twisted palms.
The water is dark and still, reflecting the bruised sky above.
There is a sense of ancient peace here, but the sand around the pool is covered in hundreds of tiny, bleached-white bones.

options.desc: This place feels wrong. Leave quickly.
